face.structure: oval with high cheekbones and a slightly pointed chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a slight upward tilt
details: delicate gold flecks around the iris
subtle gradient shading from dark to light brown
eyes.expression_effect: piercing gaze that conveys a mix of caution and curiosity

face.expression: reserved but attentive, with a hint of a smile suggesting cautious optimism

skin.rendering_notes: soft diffused lighting with subtle shading for contouring

hair.style: long and straight with a sleek finish
hair.flow: naturally falls over the shoulders with a gentle swoop to one side
details: thread-like strands with a slight sheen

character.aura: an intense yet calming presence, surrounded by an air of quiet confidence

outfit.base: traditional Korean hanbok with a modern twist
outfit.design: soft pastel tones with intricate floral embroidery
details: silk fabric with a subtle sheen
thin gold accents on the edges
outfit.fit: elegantly tailored to emphasize form without restricting movement

composition.framing: medium shot, centered with ample headroom
composition.pose: standing with one hand resting on her hip
composition.gesture: other hand gracefully gesturing outward, as if explaining something

background.color_palette: muted earth tones with hints of green foliage
background.details: minimalist furnishings with a hint of traditional elements
background.rules: avoid clutter, focus on highlighting the character's presence
